description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: osx_test, linux_test, and windows_test, each running on a different environment (macOS-11, ubuntu-20.04, and windows-latest respectively). Each job uses a matrix strategy to test with different combinations of TEST_USE_ROCKSDB and RELEASE or COMPILER. The jobs check out the repository, fetch dependencies, build tests, and run tests with different conditions.
